value.found_quote: Browse reviewed connectors in the [Anthropic Directory](https://claude.ai/directory). Directory connectors use the same MCP infrastructure as Claude Code, so you can add any remote server listed there with `claude mcp add`.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the Anthropic Directory as a registry of reviewed connectors that can be added to Claude Code with `claude mcp add`. The claim's specific examples (GitHub, Slack, Linear) and surfaces (desktop, VS Code, web, Claude.ai) are not all enumerated, but the core offering — a reviewed connector directory addable via `claude mcp add` — is directly substantiated. The page presents it as currently available, with no indication of deprecation or sunset.
